tools.name: device_risk_lookup
tools.description: Review a medical-device category's public FDA signals by three-letter product code (e.g. FRN = infusion pump). Returns recalls, MAUDE adverse-event trend, warning-letter matches, a normalized category signal, its driver contributions, and interpretation limits. It does not predict enforcement agains

tools.name: firm_compliance_history
tools.description: Build a recent, source-bounded FDA public-record timeline for a device firm: matched recalls, warning letters, and Form 483 citations where exact FEI numbers are available. Product codes are discovered from Constat's AI/ML-device corpus or may be supplied explicitly. Returns attribution and coverage

tools.name: watchlist_diff
tools.description: Return machine-generated FDA public-record changes detected for monitored product codes since a caller-supplied date, plus each code's latest category snapshot and postmarket coverage. Defaults to Constat Radar's five-code watchlist and the last seven days. Analyst verdict text and internal review s

tools.name: device_evidence_lookup
tools.description: Look up the structured premarket evidence FDA accepted for a specific AI/ML-enabled device by 510(k) number (e.g. K252148). Returns parsed summary fields — validation study design, sample sizes, endpoints, reported performance, predicate chain, PCCP — each with a verbatim source quote and page. Null

tools.name: evidence_search
tools.description: Find AI/ML device clearances by filter — product code, panel, applicant, and whether the submission reported clinical data, any sensitivity metric, or a PCCP. Answers 'what evidence did FDA accept for devices like mine'. Returns matching records with their parsed evidence. Presence flags are descrip

tools.name: predicate_chain
tools.description: Trace the predicate ancestry of a 510(k) device, with each cited predicate's age (how many years old the predicate was when the child cleared). Reveals how AI/ML devices chain to older predicates.

tools.name: evidence_cohort_stats
tools.description: Reporting-rate stats across the parsed AI/ML corpus (optionally by panel). Each rate is a presence figure with its denominator — 'reported in X of Y audited devices' — never a pooled performance value. Excludes not-yet-parsed devices from every denominator and discloses the parse queue separately. P

tools.name: device_postmarket_lookup
tools.description: Post-clearance intelligence for one AI/ML device by 510(k) number: its product code's recalls, MAUDE adverse-event level and trend, warning-letter and 483 matches for the applicant, plus per-device drift signals (adverse-event inflection, re-clearances of the same device line, software-recall patter

tools.name: postmarket_search
tools.description: Find AI/ML devices by postmarket criteria — product code, panel, applicant, whether any drift signal exists, minimum recalls in 24 months, or a rising MAUDE trend. Returns per-device postmarket summaries with drift-signal counts.

tools.name: cohort_postmarket_stats
tools.description: Postmarket presence rates across the snapshotted AI/ML device cohort (optionally by panel): share with any recall in 24 months, with a rising MAUDE trend, with any drift signal, with a warning-letter match — every rate with its denominator inline, never pooled across devices.

tools.name: reimbursement_lookup
tools.description: Trace the clearance-to-payment pathway for an AI/ML device by FDA clearance number (K/DEN, e.g. DEN170073) OR bare CPT code (e.g. 75580). Returns every payment mechanism (NTAP add-on, Category I/III CPT + CMS rate, HCPCS, MAC LCD) with amounts, effective dates, and source links, plus any commercial/

tools.name: reimbursement_search
tools.description: Find AI/ML device payment pathways by mechanism — e.g. 'devices that got NTAP', 'devices paid under a Category I CPT code', 'pathways with a known CMS dollar rate'. Filters: mechanism, CPT category, NTAP status, applicant. Returns pathways with amounts, effective dates, and sources. Use reimbursemen

tools.name: reimbursement_stats
tools.description: Distribution of payment mechanisms across the AI/ML reimbursement corpus — pathway and distinct-device counts per mechanism (NTAP, Cat I, Cat III/APC, …) with the min/median/max dollar amounts for each. Deliberately never a single pooled 'reimbursement rate': NTAP add-on amounts and CMS rates are di

tools.name: vehicle_risk_lookup
tools.description: Look up NHTSA safety history for a vehicle by make, model, and model year. Returns recall campaigns and complaint statistics (crashes, fires, injuries, top components).

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "device_postmarket_lookup" stacks urgency/override words (never, warning). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Post-clearance intelligence for one AI/ML device by 510(k) number: its product code's recalls, MAUDE adverse-event level and trend, warning-letter and 483 match…
